item.description: About Me Link to heading “Science is not about why, it’s about why not.” — Rick Sanchez Hi there, I’m Shaoyan Liu. I am currently pursuing a Master’s degree in Battery Technology at Shanghai Jiao Tong University. Prior to this, I completed my Bachelor’s degree in Energy and Power Engineering at Beijing Jiaotong University. I am interested in exploring PhD opportunities following my Master’s studies. Feel free to reach out to me via email at shaoyan_liu@sjtu.

Contact Link to heading Email: shaoyan_liu@sjtu.edu.cn Phone: +86 18518636336 Mailing Address: C3603, School of Mechanical Engineering Shanghai Jiao Tong University 800 Dongchuan RD. Minhang, Shanghai, 200240 China If you have any questions or need further information, feel free to reach out to me through any of the methods listed above :)

Publications Link to heading 6. Liu, S., Guo, Q., Zhang, J., Huang, Z., & Han, D. (2024). Investigation on Thermal Runaway Behaviors and Gas Generation Dynamics of Lithium-ion Batteries Induced by Electrical Abuse at Low Pressure Conditions. Under review. 5. Zhang, J., Ma, C., Yin, F., Guo, Q., Liu, S., Han, P., Huang, Z., & Han, D. (2024). Construction of Lithium-ion Battery Thermal Runaway Gas Generation Chemical Kinetic Mechanism using Chemical Reaction Neural Networks.
